summary.source: chrome-mcp manual probe of authenticated dominos web app

reasons: Scripted fetch to www.dominos.com/api/power/customer/profile with valid Authorization: Bearer + cookies returned 503 from Akamai WAF
Native browser XHRs from same origin succeed
Chrome TLS fingerprint (Surf transport) required to pass WAF on /api/power/* and /api/web-bff/graphql
